Well, who exactly is in your team?
Currently I've been running: Faint, Agrippa, Helot-C, Leigh.
Yeah, Faint, Agrippa, and Leigh in the same team is extremely excessive considering most of the healing you need will come from Helot herself
In this case you could switch Agrippa for Ogier for more offensive strength stacking and your shielder, and Faint for Ramona or Karen
Hameln would fit better but I'm pretty sure you don't have him
Yea I don't have Hameln, but I was interested in what a min/max team for her would look like to take note of certain units to keep an eye out for. This is what I got currently.
